title: Build an infinite-scroll stream with viewport events
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/infinite_feed_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.InfiniteFeedLive) that implements infinite scrolling with phx-viewport-top / phx-viewport-bottom and stream(:posts, initial, limit: -50) (negative limit prunes from the top). mount streams 50 posts. phx-viewport-bottom="load_more" triggers handle_event("load_more") which stream_inserts the next 50 at the end. phx-viewport-top="load_previous" handles loading the previous page. Use a single stream with a negative limit.
tier_rationale: phx-viewport-* attributes + negative stream limits are recent features. Multi-piece combo.
